race.comment: COSMIC (9) is usually thereabouts but finds it hard to win. Wasn't far away again last time when finishing fourth here second up over the same journey. Peaking now and gets a key booking in Egan. Is ready to win again. QUEEN BEIRA (11) has mixed her form this prep but backs up quickly off four days and has the peaks that measure up. Just needs a smart steer from Mott out there to be competitive. DR DAVINCI (1) broke through for his maiden win over this track and trip last time. Sparingly raced and has more to offer. Winning rider Patrick Moloney stays aboard and he cannot be underestimated. FENESTELLA (3) improved last start in a much more suitable assignment when finding a couple better at Swan Hill. Right in the mix if she holds her form.
